name: SDSU SODEXO - HANSEN HALL JACKS C STORE

violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Store single serve items next to refuse under Starbucks branded coffee maker.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Chemical spill by mop sink in mechanical room.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. -Chemical spray bottles stored next to single-use cups.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
